_comment: AI draft — Settings batch. SAVE keyd->kayd normalized separately (owner: Kaydi). This file: Settings header -> Diyaarinta (owner), Never -> Marnaba (owner), Reset -> 'Dib u bilow' (owner; was mixed 'Dib u dejis' button + 'TIRTIR' type-word). ⚠ = reset inflection to confirm.
storageSyncResetTypeWord: type-to-confirm word; now matches the action; was 'TIRTIR'
storageSyncResetTypePrompt: Ku qor BILOW si aad u xaqiijiso
storageSyncResetOfflineBlocker: Marka hore internet-ka ku xidh — waxaa jira iibyo sugaya in la diro server-ka kahor dib-u-bilowga.
storageSyncResetPendingFailedBlocker: {count, plural, =1{1 dirka ayaa fashilmay. Eeg Iibyo guuldarreystay ka hor dib-u-bilowga.} other{{count} dir ayaa fashilmay. Eeg Iibyo guuldarreystay ka hor dib-u-bilowga.}}
storageSyncResetDoneToast: Xogta maxalliga waa la dib u bilaabay. Soo dejinta xog cusub...
